mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM ad_user_mst WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ad_user_mst SET user_id_lock_yn = 'Y' , join_aprv_sts_cd = '3' WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT TRIM(TO_CHAR(COUNT(*),'999,999'))||'건' ALRM_CNT FROM ad_stm_alrm_hst WHERE stm_fir_reg_date > ( SELECT CASE WHEN SYSDATE - alrm_last_conf_date < (SELECT comm_cd FROM ad_comm_cd WHERE comm_grp_cd = 'ALARM_EXPIR_DUR' ) THEN alrm_last_conf_date WHEN SYSDATE - alrm_last_conf_date >= ( SELECT comm_cd FROM ad_comm_cd WHERE comm_grp_cd = 'ALARM_EXPIR_DUR' ) THEN SYSDATE - 14 WHEN alrm_last_conf_date IS NULL THEN TO_DATE('20190101', 'YYYYMMDD') END sel_dt FROM ad_user_mst WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) AND stm_cd = ( SELECT CASE WHEN stm_cd = '0005' THEN ( SELECT '0005' FROM ad_user_autr_map WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND autr_id = '0001' ) ELSE stm_cd END FROM dual )
